title: lessweb/deepcode-cli
friendlyTitle: A DeepSeek-focused coding agent for the terminal
summary: deepcode-cli is a TypeScript terminal coding assistant optimized for DeepSeek V4, with support for deep reasoning, reasoning-intensity controls, and agent skills. GitHub currently shows about 1.7k stars and 150 forks, with active commits on July 7.
friendlySummary: deepcode-cli is a coding assistant that runs in the terminal and is built around DeepSeek V4-style coding workflows.
whyItMatters: Developers comparing coding-agent stacks can use it as a reference for DeepSeek-oriented terminal workflows, configurable reasoning, and skill-style extensions outside the dominant Claude Code and Codex ecosystems.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to test another approach to AI coding help, especially if you want a terminal tool focused on DeepSeek models and adjustable reasoning.
